title: Feature: Make hex dev end-to-end usable — timeout fixes, model routing, error handling, test run
description: Fix the remaining issues preventing hex dev from completing a full ADR → Workplan → Swarm → Code → Validate pipeline in auto mode.

phases.name: Timeout & Routing
phases.description: Fix the infrastructure issues that caused the first test run to fail

phases.name: Error Handling & Resilience
phases.description: Make each phase resilient to partial failures

phases.name: End-to-End Validation
phases.description: Test the full pipeline and update docs

steps.description: Add configurable timeout to nexus outbound inference calls in chat.rs. Default 120s for inference endpoints (OpenRouter reasoning models can take 60s+). Add timeout parameter to call_inference_endpoint().

Fix model-to-provider matching to also resolve secret_key from vault in call_inference_endpoint (chat.rs), not just inference.rs. Apply the same vault resolution pattern to the WebSocket chat path so both REST and WS inference work with OpenRouter.

Use task-appropriate default models in hex dev phases. Workplan phase should default to meta-llama/llama-4-maverick (fast structured output) not deepseek-r1 (slow reasoning). Only ADR and fix-violations phases need reasoning models. Update DevConfig to support per-phase model overrides.

Add verbose error display to all pipeline phases in headless mode. Show full error chain ({:#}) for all Err cases. Add retry logic: if inference call fails with timeout or 429, retry once after 5s delay.

Handle workplan JSON extraction failures gracefully. If the LLM response isn't valid JSON: try extracting from markdown code fences, try a repair prompt, fall back to a single-step workplan. Log the raw response for debugging.

Run a full end-to-end test: hex dev start 'create a todo REST API in Rust using axum' --auto --budget 2.00. Verify all phases complete. Fix any remaining issues. Save the generated example app to examples/todo-api-generated/.

Update docs/guides/openrouter-setup.md and docs/guides/development-workflow.md with hex dev usage examples. Add troubleshooting section for common inference failures (timeout, rate limit, model not found).
